message:
refactor(interactive): split monolithic interactive.rs into focused submodules

Extract 8 submodules from the 6000+ line interactive.rs to improve
maintainability and reduce merge conflicts from concurrent agent work:

- commands.rs (445 lines): SlashCommand enum, parse_bash_command,
  parse_extension_command, login prompt helpers
- conversation.rs (113 lines): content block text extraction and input
  building helpers (user_content_to_text, build_content_blocks_for_input)
- file_refs.rs (355 lines): file reference parsing, path display,
  URL-to-path conversion, quote escaping
- perf.rs (830 lines): FrameTimingStats, MemoryMonitor, MemoryLevel,
  CRITICAL_KEEP_MESSAGES for TUI adaptive quality degradation
- share.rs (96 lines): gist sharing helpers (run_command_output,
  parse_gist_url_and_id, format_command_output)
- state.rs (395 lines): AgentState, InputMode, PendingInput,
  ConversationMessage, MessageRole, HistoryList, InjectedMessageQueue,
  InteractiveMessageQueue, PendingLoginKind, PendingOAuth, ToolProgress
- text_utils.rs (42 lines): queued_message_preview, truncate, push_line
- view.rs (115 lines): clamp_to_terminal_height, normalize_raw_terminal_newlines

Parent module now uses mod declarations with pub use re-exports. Queue
access changed from direct field access (.steering.len()) to encapsulated
method calls (.steering_len()). Replaced manual loop in
find_next_uncollapsed_tool_output with iterator-based .find(). Removed
now-unused imports (bubbles::list, url::Url, OAuthConfig).

Pure code-move refactor with no behavioral changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
